title: woodsia microsora
intro: Woodsia microsora, also known as the Indian cliff brake, is a type of fern found in tropical forests of Asia, characterized by its delicate, lance-shaped fronds and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Woodsia microsora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or powders, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory issues.
